title: PodGroup Lifecycle
text:
A
PodGroup
is scheduled as a unit and protected
from premature deletion while its Pods are still running.

PodGroups
are owned by the workload controller that created them (for example, a Job)
via standard
ownerReferences
. When the owning object is deleted,
PodGroups
are
automatically garbage collected.
PodGroup
names must be unique within a namespace and must be valid
DNS subdomains
.
